headline: Stop gaining weight and start moving today
summary: You're gaining when you need to lose 0.72 kg/week; today demands food discipline and hard exercise with zero compromise.
details: Eat only your portioned Huel meals today—treat emotional snacking as the progress killer it is. Get 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill today, non-negotiable. Wednesday discipline builds the foundation for weekend strength; your current +0.04 kg/week pace means you're heading toward missing your 2027 goal by nearly 40 kg.
